bio: BCA student focused on Android and Full stack development, with experience building document utility apps and modern web applications. Passionate about creating clean, practical software solutions while exploring AI-powered integrations and scalable application development.

projects.name: Amma Pastries
projects.description: A full-stack website for a pastry shop with a backend admin dashboard. Features live database integration for order assigning and delivery tracking.

projects.name: Doczis App
projects.description: A fully offline, privacy-first Android document utility app built with Kotlin and MVVM architecture. Features 12+ professional PDF tools including Image-to-PDF conversion, OCR text extraction via Google ML Kit, PDF page reordering/deletion/splitting/merging, file compression, AES-256 encryption, watermarking, and signature overlay. Built-in PDF viewer with pinch-to-zoom and document text extractor for Word/PowerPoint files. Room database for recent file tracking with search and bulk management. No ads, no accounts, no data leaves the device.

projects.name: Doczis Site
projects.description: A modern marketing landing page for the Doczis Android app built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Framer Motion. Features animated UI with dark/light theme toggle, interactive app screenshots carousel, comprehensive feature showcase across 12+ tools, APK download with API route, privacy policy, and FAQ accordion. Fully responsive with SEO metadata, Open Graph tags, and PWA manifest. Clean, fast, and focused on conversion.

projects.name: AZ Furniture
projects.description: A complete full-stack website for a furniture shop with an admin dashboard, live notifications, and database integration for inventory and order management.

certifications: 3rd Prize Certificate in Web Development - Department Level Programme

softSkills.name: Problem Solving
softSkills.desc: Debugged complex PDF-to-image conversion logic and optimized image compression algorithms in Doczis App

softSkills.name: Goal-Oriented Thinking
softSkills.desc: Delivered full-stack platforms like Amma Pastries and AZ Furniture with live database integration and admin dashboards

softSkills.name: Communication
softSkills.desc: Translated client requirements into practical features across web and Android projects with clear documentation

softSkills.name: Self-Learning
softSkills.desc: Mastered Android development with Capacitor, Java, and Kotlin independently to ship production-grade apps
